title: Clock & Time Symbols: Copy & Paste 🕐 ⌛ ⏰ Time Characters
meta_description: Copy clock and time symbols — all 24 Unicode clock faces 🕐, hourglasses ⌛, alarm clocks ⏰, watches, and AM/PM marks. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Every Unicode clock face plus hourglasses, timers, calendars, and day-night icons. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: Unicode includes a full set of 24 clock-face time symbols — one for every hour and every half hour — alongside hourglasses, alarm clocks, stopwatches, and calendar icons. They are perfect for event announcements, schedules, countdown posts, deadline reminders, and out-of-office messages. Pick the exact time you need, from 🕐 one o'clock to 🕧 half past twelve, and paste it anywhere.

sections.label: O'Clock Faces
sections.intro: Twelve clock-face emojis, one for each hour from one to twelve o'clock.

sections.label: Half-Past Faces
sections.intro: The matching half-hour set, from one-thirty through twelve-thirty.

sections.label: Timers & Calendars
sections.intro: Hourglasses, stopwatches, alarm clocks, and calendar icons for schedules and deadlines.

sections.label: Day & Night
sections.intro: Sunrise-to-night icons for marking morning, evening, and overnight times.

sections.label: Duration Marks
sections.intro: Text-style hourglasses, minute and second primes, and compact AM/PM characters.

cta: Use UltraTextGen to convert plain text into bold, italic, cursive, and 100+ other Unicode font styles — free and instant.

related.title: Weather Symbols
related.desc: Sun, rain, snow, and forecast characters to copy and paste.

related.title: Moon & Celestial Symbols
related.desc: Moon phases, stars, and night-sky characters for aesthetic posts.

related.title: Media Control Symbols
related.desc: Play, pause, and fast-forward glyphs for player-style text.

related.title: Number Symbols
related.desc: Circled, keycap, and styled number characters to copy.
